scripts.version:update: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process');const sha=cp.execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD').toString().trim();const f='js/config/config.public.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/APP_VERSION = '[^']*'/,\"APP_VERSION = '\" + sha + \"'\"));console.log('APP_VERSION set to', sha);"
